options.a: is activated by the pilot when reaching the limiting Mach number to trim attitude.
options.b: compensates for Mach tuck by trimming the stabiliser down.
options.c: compensates for Mach tuck caused by the rearward movement of the aircraft centre of pressure as an aircraft accelerates.
options.d: compensates for the forward movement of the centre of pressure, due to the forward movement of the shock wave, as speed increases.
